description: A Git version control server providing tools for repository management, including status inspection, commit history, branching, staging, and remote synchronization operations.

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Show the working tree status of a Git repository, displaying tracked, untracked, and modified files.

repo_path.description: The absolute or relative filesystem path to the Git repository.

status_output.description: The current status of the working directory, including staged, unstaged, and untracked files.

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: Show the commit logs of a Git repository with optional filtering by count and timestamp range.

repo_path.description: The absolute or relative filesystem path to the Git repository.

max_count.description: Maximum number of commits to retrieve. Defaults to 10.

start_timestamp.description: Start timestamp for filtering commits. Accepts ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z') or relative expressions (e.g., '2 weeks ago').

end_timestamp.description: End timestamp for filtering commits. Accepts ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z') or relative expressions (e.g., 'yesterday').

commits.description: List of commit entries matching the specified criteria.

hash.description: The full SHA-1 hash uniquely identifying the commit.

author.description: The name and email of the commit author.

date.description: The timestamp when the commit was created.

message.description: The commit message describing the changes.

tools.name: git_branch
tools.description: List Git branches in a repository with optional filtering by commit containment.

repo_path.description: The absolute or relative filesystem path to the Git repository.

branch_type.description: Type of branches to list. Must be one of: 'local' (local branches only), 'remote' (remote-tracking branches only), or 'all' (both local and remote).

contains.description: Filter to only show branches that contain the specified commit SHA.

not_contains.description: Filter to only show branches that do NOT contain the specified commit SHA.

branches.description: List of branches matching the specified criteria.

is_current.description: Whether this branch is currently checked out.

sha.description: The SHA-1 hash of the commit the branch points to.

tools.name: git_show
tools.description: Show the contents and metadata of a specific commit or revision.

repo_path.description: The absolute or relative filesystem path to the Git repository.

revision.description: The revision to display. Can be a commit hash, branch name, tag, or any valid Git revision reference.

context_lines.description: Number of surrounding context lines to include in the diff output. Defaults to 10.

commit_content.description: The full contents of the specified commit, including metadata and diff.

tools.name: git_diff_unstaged
tools.description: Show changes in the working directory that have not yet been staged for commit.

repo_path.description: The absolute or relative filesystem path to the Git repository.

context_lines.description: Number of surrounding context lines to include in the diff output. Defaults to 3.

diff_output.description: The unified diff output showing unstaged changes in the working directory.

tools.name: git_diff_staged
tools.description: Show changes that are currently staged and ready to be committed.

repo_path.description: The absolute or relative filesystem path to the Git repository.

context_lines.description: Number of surrounding context lines to include in the diff output. Defaults to 3.

diff_output.description: The unified diff output showing staged changes ready for commit.

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: Show differences between the current working state and a target branch or commit.

repo_path.description: The absolute or relative filesystem path to the Git repository.

target.description: The target branch name or commit hash to compare against. Defaults to 'main'.

context_lines.description: Number of surrounding context lines to include in the diff output. Defaults to 3.

diff_output.description: The unified diff output comparing the current state with the specified target.

tools.name: git_add
tools.description: Add file contents to the staging area in preparation for commit.

repo_path.description: The absolute or relative filesystem path to the Git repository.

files.description: List of file paths (relative to repository root) to stage for commit.

staged_files.description: List of file paths that were successfully staged.

tools.name: git_commit
tools.description: Record staged changes to the repository with a commit message.

repo_path.description: The absolute or relative filesystem path to the Git repository.

message.description: The commit message describing the changes being recorded.

commit_hash.description: The SHA-1 hash of the newly created commit.

message.description: The commit message that was recorded.

tools.name: git_reset
tools.description: Unstage all currently staged changes, moving them back to the working directory.

repo_path.description: The absolute or relative filesystem path to the Git repository.

status.description: The result status of the reset operation.

tools.name: git_create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch in the repository, optionally from a specified base branch.

repo_path.description: The absolute or relative filesystem path to the Git repository.

branch_name.description: The name for the new branch to be created.

base_branch.description: The existing branch or commit to use as the starting point. Defaults to the current HEAD if not specified.

branch_name.description: The name of the newly created branch.

base_branch.description: The branch or commit the new branch was created from.

tools.name: git_checkout
tools.description: Switch the working directory to a different branch.

repo_path.description: The absolute or relative filesystem path to the Git repository.

branch_name.description: The name of the branch to switch to.

current_branch.description: The name of the branch that is now checked out.

tools.name: git_push
tools.description: Push local commits to a remote repository.

repo_path.description: The absolute or relative filesystem path to the Git repository.

remote.description: The name of the remote repository to push to. Defaults to 'origin'.

branch.description: The branch to push. Defaults to the currently checked out branch if not specified.

force.description: Whether to force push, overwriting remote history. Use with caution. Defaults to false.

status.description: The result status of the push operation.

remote.description: The name of the remote repository that was pushed to.

branch.description: The name of the branch that was pushed.

tools.name: git_pull
tools.description: Fetch and integrate changes from a remote repository into the current branch.

repo_path.description: The absolute or relative filesystem path to the Git repository.

remote.description: The name of the remote repository to pull from. Defaults to 'origin'.

branch.description: The remote branch to pull. Defaults to the tracking branch of the current branch if not specified.

rebase.description: Whether to rebase local commits on top of fetched commits instead of merging. Defaults to false.

status.description: The result status of the pull operation.

remote.description: The name of the remote repository that was pulled from.

branch.description: The name of the branch that was pulled.

updated_files.description: List of file paths that were updated by the pull operation.
